commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cbe828810baaf49e3be66abb4914da004e402502)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Nextcloud Talk webhook decoding to parse JSON before strict Note schema validation and adds signed replay tests for malformed JSON, malformed Note payloads, Document events, and setup pings.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +77. Total +109 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.6.8 map signed schema misses to HTTP 400 before classifying valid non-message events, and PR head still sends Note-shaped Like/Undo reaction schema misses to HTTP 400. I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer action to fix the reaction classifier and provide real-path proof; this is not a safe repair-lane item while contributor proof is missing.

target.title: fix(nextcloud-talk): return 200 for non-message webhook events instead of 400
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
